sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 오라클은 2026년 4월 6일부로 힐러리 맥슨(Hilary Maxson)을 신임 최고재무책임자(CFO)로 선임했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 오라클은 슈나이더 일렉트릭 출신의 힐러리 맥슨을 신임 CFO로 영입하며 경영진 변화를 단행했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 힐러리 맥슨 신임 CFO는 과거 슈나이더 일렉트릭에서 자본 배분, 비즈니스 모델 전환 및 장기 가치 창출 전략을 주도한 경험을 바탕으로 오라클의 재무 조직을 이끌 예정입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 오라클이 발행한 보통주 및 시리즈 D 강제 전환 우선주의 액면가는 각각 0.01달러입니다.

watchItems.text: 신임 CFO 체제 하에서 오라클의 자본 배분 전략 및 비즈니스 모델 전환이 향후 실적에 미칠 영향에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

Emerging growth company ☐ If an emerging growth company, indicate by check mark if the registrant has elected not to use the extended transition period for complying with any new or revised financial accounting standards provided pursuant to Section 13(a) of the Exchange Act. ☐ Section 5—Corporate Governance and Management Item 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers; Compensatory Arrangements of Certain Officers On April 6, 2026, Or  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.01 = 0.01달러.

acle Corporation (“Oracle”) announced that Hilary Maxson will join Oracle as Chief Financial Officer on April 6, 2026. Ms. Maxson, age 48, served as Executive Vice President and Group Chief Financial Officer of Schneider Electric SE (“Schneider”) from 2020 until April 2026. In this role, Ms. Maxson was a member of Schneider’s Executive Committee and led their global finance organization supporting capital allocation, business model transformation and long-term value creation strategy. Prior to that she was Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Energy Management of Schneider from 2019-2020 and Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Building and IT of Schneider from 2017 to the end of 2018. Ms. Maxson serves on the board of directors of Anglo American plc. There are no arrangements or understandings between Ms. Maxson and any other persons pursuant to which she was
